html:
The Beekeeper Hat is a wearable Armor item, crafted in the Dress Tab. It requires 8 Silk and 1 Rope to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype.

The Beekeeper Hat has 750 durability and absorbs 80% of damage taken from Bees and Killer Bees. It is useful when a player is harvesting Honey from a Bee Box or destroying Beehives.

Downloadable Content

In all DLCs, the Beekeeper Hat provides 20% Wetness resistance during Rain. In the Shipwrecked DLC, it can be obtained from the Slot Machine.

Trivia

  • The Beekeeper Hat was added in the October 2, 2012 update.

Assets

  • Equipped
  • Dropped

Gallery

  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
  • Wilson wearing a Beekeeper Hat.
  • Willow wearing a Beekeeper Hat.
  • Wolfgang wearing a Beekeeper Hat.
  • Wendy wearing a Beekeeper Hat.
  • WX-78 wearing a Beekeeper Hat.
  • Wickerbottom wearing a Beekeeper Hat.
  • Woodie wearing a Beekeeper Hat.
  • Wes wearing a Beekeeper Hat.
  • Maxwell wearing a Beekeeper Hat.
  • Wigfrid wearing a Beekeeper Hat.
  • Webber wearing a Beekeeper Hat.
  • Walani wearing a Beekeeper Hat.
  • Warly wearing a Beekeeper Hat.
  • Wilbur wearing a Beekeeper Hat.
  • Woodlegs wearing a Beekeeper Hat.
  • Wilba wearing a Beekeeper Hat.
  • Wormwood wearing a Beekeeper Hat.
  • Wheeler wearing a Beekeeper Hat.
  • Winona wearing a Beekeeper Hat.
  • Wortox wearing a Beekeeper Hat.
  • Wurt wearing a Beekeeper Hat.
  • Beekeeper Hat Equipped

"beehat"
“Protects your skin, but squashes your meticulous coiffure.”
–Wilson
“This will keep the pokeys off of me.”
–Willow
“Is hat for to protect from stinger bees.”
–Wolfgang
“This will protect me from those happy buzzing sounds. Oh, and stings.”
–Wendy
“THE MESH IS SMALLER THAN BEE STINGERS”
–WX-78
“Appropriate protective equipment is a must!”
–Wickerbottom
“That'll keep the bees out of my eyes.”
–Woodie
“I'll wear it if I have to.”
–Maxwell
“Its translucent mesh allows for closer contact.”
–Wagstaff
“My bee helm, öf cöurse.”
–Wigfrid
“A fortress for my face.”
–Webber
“Stops the bee kisses.”
–Walani
“Essential honey harvesting attire.”
–Warly
“Woodlegs ain't no honey farmer!”
–Woodlegs
“BEES NAUGHT STINGING WILBA NOW”
–Wilba
“Looks good”
–Wormwood
“I'm wearing this the next time I go out on the town.”
–Wheeler
“Respecting bees means respecting stingers.”
–Winona
“What if my horns get stung?”
–Wortox
“Can't see in here!”
–Wurt
“I can finally walk among the bees!”
–Walter
“I like having a layer of netting between the bees and my face.”
–Wanda
The Beekeeper Hat is a wearable Armor item, crafted in the Dress Tab. It requires 8 Silk and 1 Rope to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype.
The Beekeeper Hat has 750 durability and absorbs 80% of damage taken from Bees and Killer Bees. It is useful when a player is harvesting Honey from a Bee Box or destroying Beehives.
Downloadable Content[edit | edit source]
In all DLCs, the Beekeeper Hat provides 20% Wetness resistance during Rain. In the Shipwrecked DLC, it can be obtained from the Slot Machine.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Beekeeper Hat was added in the October 2, 2012 update.

The '''Beekeeper Hat''' is a wearable [[Armor]] item, crafted in the [[Dress|Dress Tab]]. It requires 8 [[Silk]] and 1 [[Rope]] to craft and an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype.

The Beekeeper Hat has 750 durability and absorbs 80% of damage taken from [[Bee]]s and [[Killer Bee]]s. It is useful when a player is harvesting [[Honey]] from a [[Bee Box]] or destroying [[Beehive]]s.

== {{Pic32|Gift Icon}} Downloadable Content ==
In all [[DLC]]s, the Beekeeper Hat provides 20% [[Wetness]] resistance during [[Rain]]. In the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC, it can be obtained from the [[Slot Machine]].

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Beekeeper Hat was added in the ''[[Version History#October 2.2C 2012.5B18.5D|October 2, 2012]]'' update.
